# mtncloud_user (Data Source)

Looks up an MTN Cloud user by username.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up an existing user by username.
data "mtncloud_user" "jdoe" {
  username = "jdoe"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `username` (String) Username to look up.

### Read-Only

- `email` (String) Email address of the user.
- `first_name` (String) First name.
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the user.
- `last_name` (String) Last name.
